name: Goblin
content: Goblin: HP 7, AC 15, Speed 30ft. Attack: Scimitar +4 to hit, 1d6+2 slashing. Traits: Nimble Escape (can Disengage or Hide as bonus action). Tactics: goblins prefer ambushes from cover, and flee when outnumbered or when a leader falls. They cackle and shriek in their guttural tongue.

name: Orc
content: Orc: HP 15, AC 13, Speed 30ft. Attack: Greataxe +5 to hit, 1d12+3 slashing. Traits: Aggressive (can move up to its speed toward a hostile as a bonus action). Tactics: orcs charge headlong into battle, favoring overwhelming force and brutal close combat. They worship Gruumsh, the one-eyed war god.

name: Skeleton
content: Skeleton: HP 13, AC 13, Speed 30ft. Attack: Shortsword +4 to hit, 1d6+2 piercing, or Shortbow +4, 1d6+2 piercing. Vulnerable to bludgeoning. Immune to poison and exhaustion. Tactics: silent, relentless, fights to destruction with no fear or self-preservation.

name: Zombie
content: Zombie: HP 22, AC 8, Speed 20ft. Attack: Slam +3 to hit, 1d6+1 bludgeoning. Traits: Undead Fortitude (when reduced to 0 HP, makes a CON save DC 5 + damage to drop to 1 HP instead, unless radiant or critical). Tactics: shambling, slow, but devastatingly hard to put down.

name: Wolf
content: Wolf: HP 11, AC 13, Speed 40ft. Attack: Bite +4 to hit, 2d4+2 piercing. On hit, target makes DC 11 STR save or be knocked prone. Traits: Pack Tactics (advantage on attacks if an ally is within 5ft of target). Keen Hearing and Smell. Tactics: hunt in packs, isolate prey.

name: Giant Spider
content: Giant Spider: HP 26, AC 14, Speed 30ft, climb 30ft. Attack: Bite +5 to hit, 1d8+3 piercing plus DC 11 CON save or take 2d8 poison and become poisoned. Web (recharge 5-6): DC 12 DEX save or restrained. Tactics: ambushes from webs in dark crawlspaces and ruined towers.

name: Bandit
content: Bandit: HP 11, AC 12 (leather armor), Speed 30ft. Attack: Scimitar +3 to hit, 1d6+1 slashing, or Crossbow +3, 1d8+1 piercing. Tactics: bandits rarely fight to the death; they bluff, threaten, and flee if a fight goes poorly. Often led by a Bandit Captain.

name: Troll
content: Troll: HP 84, AC 15, Speed 30ft. Attack: Multiattack — 1 bite (+7 to hit, 1d6+4 piercing) and 2 claws (+7, 2d6+4 slashing). Regeneration: regains 10 HP at the start of its turn unless it took fire or acid damage that turn. Tactics: brutally strong, only fire or acid stops it for good.

name: Vampire Spawn
content: Vampire Spawn: HP 82, AC 15, Speed 30ft, climb 30ft. Attack: Multiattack — Claws (+6, 2d4+3 slashing plus grapple) and Bite (+6, 1d6+3 piercing plus 2d6 necrotic, target's max HP reduced). Regeneration 10 unless in sunlight or after taking radiant. Tactics: cunning, seductive, flees to coffin if low.

name: Young Red Dragon
content: Young Red Dragon: HP 178, AC 18, Speed 40ft, fly 80ft. Multiattack: 1 bite (+10, 2d10+6 piercing plus 1d6 fire) and 2 claws (+10, 2d6+6 slashing). Fire Breath (recharge 5-6): 30ft cone, DC 17 DEX save, 16d6 fire damage (half on save). Tactics: prideful, toys with foes, claims hoards in mountain lairs.

name: Giant Rat
content: Giant Rat: HP 7, AC 12, Speed 30ft. Attack: Bite +4 to hit, 1d4+2 piercing. Pack Tactics. Keen Smell. Tactics: appear in swarms in cellars, sewers, and forgotten dungeons; relatively weak alone but dangerous in numbers.
